# ElicitationForm.IsElicitAction method

Returns `true` when *value* is one of the three defined elicitation actions — `"accept"`, `"decline"`, or `"cancel"` (spec §20.5, R-20.5-a).

```csharp
public static bool IsElicitAction(string? value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The candidate action wire string. |

## Return Value

`true` when a defined action.
